legal_disclaimer: Engineering and data-governance review; not formal legal advice.

sources.publisher: U.S. Health Resources and Services Administration
sources.available_data: Active Health Center Service Delivery and Look-Alike site names, organizations, public contacts, locations, counties, and reported weekly operating hours
sources.owner: U.S. Health Resources and Services Administration, Bureau of Primary Health Care
sources.attribution_required: CivicSignal will attribute HRSA and link the exact dataset landing page on every resulting record
sources.modification_allowed: Usage limitations are listed as none; CivicSignal creates a neutral factual projection and retains the source snapshot hash
sources.automated_access_allowed: Download is offered for public reuse; recurring automation remains disabled until a named technical reviewer approves rate and change controls
sources.rate_limit: One manually initiated snapshot; no scheduled retrieval approved
sources.freshness: Official page updated 2026-07-16; source refresh cycle daily; staged records carry 2026 source-record dates
sources.quality: Authoritative for HRSA-supported site identity and dataset fields; not proof of current services, eligibility, daily hours, price, or availability
sources.reason: Usage limitations are none; 18,953 active 2026 records may be imported only as private candidates requiring per-record human review before the separate governed publication workflow

sources.available_data: Municipal department names, public office contacts, hours, and program links
sources.owner: Town of Plymouth and possible third-party contributors
sources.attribution_required: Unknown; attribute every factual record to the Town and its official page
sources.robots_review: Ordinary department pages are not disallowed by the robots file reviewed 2026-07-18; this is not a license
sources.quality: Authoritative for municipal offices; program details can change
sources.reason: Allow narrow human collection of uncopyrightable facts only after page-specific review; do not scrape or copy prose

sources.available_data: Official statewide program eligibility, application, accessibility, and contact facts
sources.owner: Commonwealth agencies and identified third parties
sources.attribution_required: Attribute the responsible Commonwealth agency and exact official page
sources.modification_allowed: Facts may be neutrally summarized; copyrighted text must not be copied
sources.caching_allowed: Not established for the pages reviewed
sources.redistribution_allowed: Page-specific and subject to public-record/copyright limits
sources.freshness: Page-specific; verify each record and set a review date
sources.quality: Authoritative for state programs, but eligibility and availability change
sources.reason: Manual fact collection only pending a page-specific rights review; high-risk programs need enhanced human review

sources.available_data: Federal and participating-government dataset catalog metadata
sources.owner: Publishing agencies identified by each dataset
sources.caching_allowed: Catalog API is intended for automated use; dataset-specific terms still govern content
sources.rate_limit: Follow the current catalog API documentation
sources.quality: Discovery metadata only; not itself a verified service directory
sources.reason: Catalog metadata alone is not a nationwide service inventory; each discovered dataset requires its own record-level license and schema review

sources.quality: Potentially useful but a separate curated collection
sources.reason: No permission or licensed API was obtained; do not copy the directory

sources.quality: Not assessed for licensed CivicSignal use
sources.reason: Proprietary directory; no permission or licensed API supplied

sources.available_data: Business listings, reviews, and contact details
sources.rate_limit: Not applicable without an approved licensed API
sources.reason: Do not copy proprietary platform databases or user content
